source_text:
友邦保險在亞洲歷史悠久，源遠流長，經歷各種社會動盪和不明朗時期仍能妥善管理業務，因而贏得卓著的
聲譽，體現友邦保險誠可信賴、強韌穩健，並堅持為持分者做對的事。自2020年初以來，2019冠狀病毒病大流
行導致營商環境不斷變化及日趨複雜，而政治、宏觀經濟及資本市場亦出現前所未見的轉移。在這樣的環境下，
友邦保險的財務實力，以及「幫助大眾活出健康、長久、好生活」的目標，更具重大意義。本人衷心感謝友邦
保險所有員工、代理和合作夥伴，即使面對最嚴峻的挑戰，他們仍關懷社區，克盡己職，專心致志地為客戶、
其家庭以及我們的社區提供支援。

initial_translation: AIA has a long and storied history in Asia. Having navigated various periods of social upheaval and uncertainty while managing our business prudently, we have earned a distinguished reputation that reflects our trustworthiness, resilience and steadfast commitment to doing the right thing for our stakeholders. Since early 2020, the COVID-19 pandemic has created an increasingly complex and dynamic business environment, while political, macroeconomic and capital market conditions have undergone unprecedented shifts. In such circumstances, AIA's financial strength and our purpose of helping people live healthier, longer, better lives take on even greater significance. I wish to express my heartfelt gratitude to all AIA employees, agents and partners who, despite facing the most severe challenges, have continued to care for our communities, fulfilled their responsibilities with dedication, and remained focused on providing support to our customers, their families and our communities.

source_text:
自疫情大流行開始以來，本集團的各業務團隊反應迅速，積極協助紓緩對社區的影響，同時確保員工安全。本集
團為此廣泛採取多項措拖，包括財政支持、提供醫療物資、免費保障覆蓋、獲取醫療保健資源、精簡服務流程和
加快理賠支付，令我引以為榮。我們一如既往找出每一個可以作出理賠的理由，年內已支付逾160億美元的保險
給付及理賠，為客戶提供極其重要的財務保障。

增長7%。截至2020年12月31日，內涵價值權益創新高，達672億美元，集團當地資本總和法覆蓋率為374%，足

initial_translation: Although measures to contain the spread of COVID-19 resulted in New Business Value declining to US$2.765 billion, sales momentum turned positive as mobility restrictions eased, and we entered 2021 with very strong momentum, with New Business Value in the first two months growing 15% year-on-year. Our large and growing portfolio of in-force policies, which generates high-quality and recurring income streams, drove a 5% increase in Operating Profit After Tax in 2020, while Free Surplus generated during the period grew 7%. As at 31 December 2020, Embedded Value equity reached a record high of US$67.2 billion, and the Group's local capital aggregation method coverage ratio stood at 374%, demonstrating our strong capital position and prudent financial management.
compact_translation: Although COVID-19 containment measures reduced New Business Value to US$2.765 billion, sales momentum turned positive as restrictions eased, entering 2021 with strong momentum and 15% year-on-year New Business Value growth in the first two months. Our large, growing in-force policy portfolio generated high-quality recurring income, driving 5% Operating Profit After Tax growth in 2020 and 7% Free Surplus growth. As at 31 December 2020, Embedded Value equity reached a record US$67.2 billion, with Group local capital aggregation method coverage at 374%, demonstrating strong capital position and prudent financial management.

上。稅後營運溢利增長受益於全年顯著正面理賠經驗，其抵銷了新固定收入投資的收益率下跌及假設長期股權投
資回報減少的影響。一如預期，上半年所述的異常正面醫療理賠經驗並未在下半年再次發生，但我們繼續看到此
來源對稅後營運溢利增長的正面貢獻。在友邦保險泰國業務的失效經驗恢復正常的情況下，下半年的續保率有所
改善，而本集團的續保率為95%。

Operating Profit After Tax growth benefited from significantly favorable claims experience throughout the year, which offset the decline in yields on new fixed income investments and the impact of reduced assumed long-term equity investment returns. With AIA's Thailand business lapse experience normalizing, the renewal rate improved in the second half, while the Group's renewal rate was 95%.

initial_translation: Although New Business Value in 2020 decreased by 33% to USD 2.765 billion compared with 2019, we rapidly adopted new digital tools, and the widespread relaxation of movement restrictions supported the recovery of sales momentum. AIA's China business made the largest contribution to the Group's New Business Value in 2020 and was the first reporting segment to demonstrate recovery in sales momentum, as the region progressively eased strict lockdowns from March 2020 onwards. Excluding the subdued sales from mainland Chinese visitors to Hong Kong, the Group's other segments achieved strong recovery in New Business Value in the second half, growing 23% compared with the first half. The Group's new business development momentum remained robust in 2021, with New Business Value in the first two months 15% higher than the corresponding period in 2020.

Excluding subdued mainland Chinese visitor sales to Hong Kong, other segments achieved strong NBV recovery in H2, up 23% versus H1. Group new business momentum remained robust in 2021, with NBV in the first two months 15% higher than the corresponding 2020 period.

initial_translation: AIA's China business demonstrated strong momentum in 2021, with new business value in the first two months showing very robust growth compared to the same period in 2020. In 2020, new business value of USD 968 million represented a 17% decrease from 2019, primarily due to limited sales in the early stages of the COVID-19 outbreak in the first quarter. As mobility restrictions eased, new business momentum improved rapidly. New business value resumed its customary seasonal pattern, with a greater proportion concentrated in the first half of the year. In 2020, AIA's China business made the largest contribution to the Group's new business value.

在實施旅遊限制後，友邦保險香港業務來自中國內地訪港客戶的新業務銷售自2020年2月初起實際上已暫停，導
致其新業務價值大幅下降。新業務價值利潤率錄得跌幅，反映新業務量減少導致承保開支超支、產品組合變動及
利率下降的影響所致。澳門在2020年9月底恢復中國內地旅客個人遊計劃。這為澳門的中國內地訪澳客戶銷售回
升提供支持，使其在第四季佔友邦保險澳門分公司的年化新保費總額超過三分之一。

initial_translation: Following the implementation of travel restrictions, new business sales from Mainland China visitors to AIA's Hong Kong operations were effectively suspended from early February 2020, resulting in a significant decline in New Business Value. The New Business Value Profit Margin recorded a decrease, reflecting the impact of reduced new business volume leading to underwriting expense overruns, product mix changes, and the effect of lower interest rates. Macau resumed the Individual Visit Scheme for Mainland China visitors at the end of September 2020. This supported a recovery in sales from Mainland China visitors to Macau, which accounted for more than one-third of AIA's Macau branch's total Annualized New Premium in the fourth quarter.
